title: Lance's Protocol
author: Lance Vowell
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.r7yd9pw

steps.instruction: draw a circle inside the triangle drawn in step 1 so that it touches each side of the triangle
From the top angle of the trangle, draw a horizonal line down through the center so it ends as it touches the base.
Draw an equalateral triangle with a base of at least 2.5 inches and one angle facing the top of the paper.
